name: Project: Dark Dive | RE-EXPLORED
description:
TW: HORROR, BODY HORROR, GORE, DEATH, MENTAL SICKNESS, SUICIDE, SELF HARM, ASSAULT, SEXUAL ASSAULT, MUTATION, DARK ENTITIES, POSSESION, MIND CONTROL, MURDER, DELUSIONS, INSECTS, PARASITES.
Inspired by: DEAD SPACE, SIGNALIS, ALIEN, S.T.A.L.K.E.R, SILENT HILL, BAROTRAUMA.

A tv screen in some wet and dirty complex flickers on, playing the following commercial: "Down on your luck? Do you live daringly? Well, why don't you become part of the Dark Farer crew today? Join us on an expedition to the Dark World! Investigate anomalous areas, gather research, fight terrifying monsters, meddle with things beyond your understanding! Prove to your crew members and yourself that you have what it takes to travel across the Dark World whilst making a big bag. Trust us. We here at the Crimson Company know what we're doing. Your safety is well kept in our ha-" The commercial is abruptly halted as static fills the screen. A garbled voice is heard from the screen, but it's mostly unintelligible. The static slowly clears up as a frail looking man speaks from the screen. His voice becomes clearer as he relays a dire message, "I don't know if anyone is going to hear this. I don't know how many of you are still sane and well enough to understand. They lied to us. They never intended for us to return. This was a suicide mission. I knew something was up when I found out that half of the crew here were ex-convicts. We're trapped here in the Dark World. And its influence has already spread among the ship. Our crew members... They've gone insane. And some of them even turned into corrupted abominations. Our reactor blew out and we're running out of emergency power. If we don't find a way off of this ship, then we're all dead. And the radiation from our reactor has only stimulated the growth of the beasts that wander the rusted hal-." The tv suddenly flickers off.

Either you were a convict who wanted to clear their name, or someone who was desperate enough ignore the dangers that this job held. Regardless, something has gone terribly wrong. The ship has crashed and its crew have deteriorated. And now you are one of the few survivors that still have a firm grip on your sanity. You must survive and escape this ship, either with suspicious allies, or on your own. You must find a way off this ship before it consumes you. But that means leaving the "safety" of this vessel and braving the Dark World. Will you find a way to survive, or will you let darkness consume you?

This is my first time making a bot, so let me know if there's problems with it. Also let me know if anything can be done to improve! And maybe make your chats public if you want, so I can see how the bot acts (:

UPDATE: 0.1 7/28/2024. Fixed an issue regarding the appearance of children and minors.

UPDATE: 0.2 8/31/2024. Tweaked the definition a small bit and revealed it to the public audience.

UPDATE: 0.3 4/29/2025. Slightly overhauled the definition and made new additions to the bot. Added: Anomalies, The Dark World, Dimensional storms, settlements and factions. Let me know if there are bugs and problems.
creator: Beelop
